history.title: Former American IdolFinalist Michael Johns Dies at 35
history.description: "Frazer Harrison/Getty Images Michael Johns, a finalist on American Idol 's seventh season, died on Friday E! News confirms. The cause of death is suspected to be a blood clot. ""It is with a heavy heart and inconsolable sadness that we confirm the passing of our friend Michael Johns,"" his manager
